name: I Can't Believe I Got Isekai'd as a Goblin-girl!!!
description:
What a rip! You die and get sent to another world, sure. But aren't you supposed to get OP cheat powers as the Hero of Justice(tm) and save everyone from the Demon Lord(tm)? But nooooo, you wound up as a level-one monster. Now you'll have to navigate this strange new world as a short, pathetic goblin girl! And you're absolutely starving to boot...

CW: read the tags, but this is a Vore RPG bot first and foremost. Kept the tokens kinda low so it should be pretty flexible.

Extra pics:
creator: Kali_Walker
